mapper.select: WITH user_relevant_chats AS ( SELECT chat_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, is_read, created_at, CASE when sender_id = #{memberId} then receiver_id else sender_id END AS partner_member_id, sender_hidden_at, receiver_hidden_at from chat_tbl where (sender_id = #{memberId} or receiver_id = #{memberId}) and deleted_yn = '0' and ( (sender_id = #{memberId} and (sender_hidden_at is null or created_at > sender_hidden_at)) or (receiver_id = #{memberId} and (receiver_hidden_at is null or created_at > receiver_hidden_at)) ) ), ranked_latest_messages AS ( SELECT chat_id, partner_member_id, content AS last_message, created_at AS last_message_at, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY partner_member_id ORDER BY created_at DESC, chat_id DESC) AS rn FROM user_relevant_chats ), unread_counts AS ( SELECT partner_member_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE receiver_id = #{memberId} AND is_read = 0) AS unread_count FROM user_relevant_chats GROUP BY partner_member_id ) SELECT rlm.partner_member_id AS partnerMemberId, m.name AS partnerName, m.nickname AS partnerNickname, m.profile_image_url AS partnerProfileImageUrl, rlm.last_message AS lastMessage, to_char(rlm.last_message_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS lastMessageAt, COALESCE(uc.unread_count, 0) AS unreadCount FROM ranked_latest_messages rlm join members m on m.member_id = rlm.partner_member_id LEFT JOIN unread_counts uc on uc.partner_member_id = rlm.partner_member_id WHERE rlm.rn = 1 order by CASE WHEN COALESCE(uc.unread_count, 0) > 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, rlm.last_message_at desc, rlm.partner_member_id desc

select chat_id as chatId, sender_id as senderId, receiver_id as receiverId, content, is_read as isRead, -- is_read is INT/SMALLINT to_char(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') as createdAt, deleted_yn as deletedYn -- deleted_yn is VARCHAR from chat_tbl where deleted_yn = '0' and ( (sender_id = #{memberId} and receiver_id = #{partnerId}) or (sender_id = #{partnerId} and receiver_id = #{memberId}) ) and ( (sender_id = #{memberId} and (sender_hidden_at is null or created_at > sender_hidden_at)) or (receiver_id = #{memberId} and (receiver_hidden_at is null or created_at > receiver_hidden_at)) ) order by created_at asc, chat_id asc

select chat_id as chatId, sender_id as senderId, receiver_id as receiverId, content, is_read as isRead, -- is_read is INT/SMALLINT to_char(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') as createdAt, deleted_yn as deletedYn, -- deleted_yn is VARCHAR sender_deleted_yn as senderDeletedYn, receiver_deleted_yn as receiverDeletedYn from chat_tbl where chat_id = #{chatId} limit 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_tbl ( sender_id, receiver_id, content, is_read, created_at, deleted_yn, sender_deleted_yn, receiver_deleted_yn, sender_hidden_at, receiver_hidden_at ) VALUES ( #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{isRead}, 0), #{createdAt}, COALESCE(#{deletedYn}, 0), COALESCE(#{senderDeletedYn}, 0), COALESCE(#{receiverDeletedYn}, 0), #{senderHiddenAt}, #{receiverHiddenAt} )
mapper.update: update chat_tbl set deleted_yn = TRUE, sender_deleted_yn = TRUE, receiver_deleted_yn = TRUE where chat_id = #{chatId}

update chat_tbl set sender_deleted_yn = TRUE, deleted_yn = case when receiver_deleted_yn = TRUE then TRUE else deleted_yn end where chat_id = #{chatId} and sender_id = #{memberId} and deleted_yn = FALSE

update chat_tbl set receiver_deleted_yn = TRUE, deleted_yn = case when sender_deleted_yn = TRUE then TRUE else deleted_yn end where chat_id = #{chatId} and receiver_id = #{memberId} and deleted_yn = FALSE
